title: ActionLogEntry
description: Schema for a single entry in memory/data/action_log.json. Written by memory/store.py after every action execution.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the action was executed

plan_id.description: ID of the plan this action belonged to

action_id.description: ID of the specific action within the plan

action_type.description: Logical action type that was executed

os.description: OS on which the action was executed

command_executed.description: Actual system command that was run

approved_by.description: Whether approval came from user (HIL) or was auto-approved

verify_result.description: Outcome from verifier after this action

notes.description: Any additional context or error message
